3059050.name: High Impact
3059050.description:
First Person Shooter with very detailed worlds. It includes Platforming and rooms with Puzzles that you need to solve in order to advance.

Features:

First Person Shooting
Floating Pole Grabbing for vertical gameplay
Alien Spider Monsters
Giant Golem Boss
Jumps from building to building
Underwater moments
Slightly obscured targets you need to find

Objective: Reach and touch the checkered finish line at the far end of the level.

Tip: Sometimes you need to shoot the targets before touching the goal post.

Controls:
Walk: ASDW
Jump: Spacebar
Shoot: Left Mouse Button
Crouch: Left Control
Pause: P or Start (gamepad)

Game proudly written in Java programming language.

Compatible with gamepad: Logitech F310
3059050.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
